items.title: Per source, last two years of John Collins' contract are non-guaranteed. Don't have the exact figures yet, but only first year is fully-guaranteed. Similar structure as Duncan Robinson's deal last season.

items.body_excerpt: Per source, last two years of John Collins' contract are non-guaranteed. Don't have the exact figures yet, but only first year is fully-guaranteed. Similar structure as Duncan Robinson's deal last season.

items.title: The Heat will bring Bobby Portis in via the Duncan Robinson TPE they have.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Heat will bring Bobby Portis in via the Duncan Robinson TPE they have.

Miami will be hard-capped at the first apron after completing this deal, which will be in July after the league year changes over.
